title: Restore and redeploy Version 12

requirements.text: Restore the application to the exact state of Version 12, reverting all changes introduced in versions 13 through 16 (inclusive) across both the frontend and backend.

quotes: I want reuploade version 12 so please restore version 12 and reuploade this version

acceptanceCriteria: All frontend files match the state they were in at Version 12
All backend files match the state they were in at Version 12
No code or logic from versions 13–16 remains in the codebase
The application builds and runs successfully after the restore

constraints: Do not carry over any changes from versions 13, 14, 15, or 16
Immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui) must remain untouched
nonGoals: Introducing any new features during this restore
Merging or cherry-picking individual changes from later versions
